array.string: cd "__REPO_ROOT__" && source .venv/bin/activate && export CELERY_ENABLED=true WORKFLOW_V2_ENABLED=true WORKFLOW_V2_EXECUTE_M2=true ORCH_QUEUE_PROFILE=launchd_local CELERY_DISPATCH_QUEUE=orch_dispatch_launchd_local CELERY_EXECUTE_QUEUE=orch_execute_launchd_local CELERY_HEARTBEAT_QUEUE=orch_heartbeat_launchd_local CELERY_FILEAPP_INGEST_ENABLED=false CELERY_S3_FILES_INGEST_QUEUE=orch_fileapp_ingest_launchd_local CELERY_SOURCE_LIST_INGEST_QUEUE=orch_fileapp_source_list_launchd_local CELERY_DISPATCH_WORKSPACE_UUID=ba7eb0ec-e565-447c-8c11-8f870cf72a60 CELERY_GENERATE_FILE_ENABLED=false && exec celery -A app.core.celery_app:celery_app worker --hostname=orch-celery-worker@_macbook_deivid_dev -n orch-worker-legacy@%h -Q orch_dispatch_launchd_local,orch_execute_launchd_local,orch_heartbeat_launchd_local --without-mingle --without-gossip -l INFO
